============================================================================\n\n// loadTestData reads and returns the content of a testdata file.\n// It is a helper function for integration tests that need to load YAML files.\nfunc loadTestData(path string) ([]byte, error) {\n\t// Prepend \"testdata/\" if not already present\n\tif !strings.HasPrefix(path, \"testdata/\") {\n\t\tpath = filepath.Join(\"testdata\", path)\n\t}\n\n\t// Read the file\n\tcontent, err := os.ReadFile(path)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn content, nil\n}\n\n// TestLoadValidYAML tests loading valid_simple.yaml and validates expected values.\nfunc TestLoadValidYAML(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestFile := \"valid_simple.yaml\"\n\n\t// Load test data using helper\n\tcontent, err := loadTestData(testFile)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"loadTestData(%s) failed: %v\", testFile, err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify content is not empty\n\tif len(content) == 0 {\n\t\tt.Error(\"expected non-empty content from valid_simple.yaml\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse the loaded YAML content\n\tparser := NewParser()\n\tvar data map[string]interface{}\n\tresult := parser.ParseString(string(content), &data)\n\n\tif !result.Success {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"ParseString failed: %v\", result.Error)\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify expected values from loaded YAML\n\tassertions := []struct {\n\t\tkey      string\n\t\texpected interface{}\n\t}{\n\t\t{\"name\", \"test-config\"},\n\t\t{\"version\", int64(1)},\n\t\t{\"enabled\", true},\n\t\t{\"count\", int64(42)},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, assertion := range assertions {\n\t\tactual := data[assertion.key]\n\t\tif actual != assertion.expected {\n\t\t\t// Handle int vs int64 comparison\n\t\t\tif expectedInt, ok := assertion.expected.(int64); ok {\n\t\t\t\tif actualInt, ok := actual.(int); ok && int64(actualInt) == expectedInt {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected %s=%v, got %v\", assertion.key, assertion.expected, actual)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify description field\n\tif description, ok := data[\"description\"].(string); !ok || description == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Error(\"expected non-empty description string\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestLoadNestedYAML tests loading valid_nested.yaml and validates nested structures.\nfunc TestLoadNestedYAML(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestFile := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"existing\": \"value\",\n\t\t\"nil_val\":  nil,\n\t}\n\n\tt.Run(\"existing field\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tresult, err := GetRequiredField(data, \"existing\")\n\t\tif func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t_, err := GetRequiredField(data, \"missing\")\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"expected error for missing field, got nil\")\n\t\t} else if _, ok := err.(*FieldNotFoundError); !ok {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected FieldNotFoundError, got: %T\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"nil field\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t_, err := GetRequiredField(data, \"nil_val\")\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"expected error for nil field, got nil\")\n\t\t} else if _, ok := err.(*FieldNotFoundError); !ok {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected FieldNotFoundError, got: %T\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc TestGetRequiredString(t *testing.T) {\n\tdata := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"string\": \"value\",\n\t\t\"number\": 42,\n\t}\n\n\tt.Run(\"existing string\", func(t {\n\tdata := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"field1\": \"value1\",\n\t\t\"nested\": map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"field2\": \"value2\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"nil_field\": nil,\n\t}\n\n\tt.Run(\"all {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected no missing fields, got: %v\", missing)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"some required fields missing\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\trequired := []string{\"field1\", len(missing))\n\t\t}\n\t\tif missing[0] != \"missing_field\" {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected 'missing_field', got: %q\", missing[0])\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"nil field is considered missing\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\trequired := []string{\"nil_field\"}\n\t\tmissing := ValidateRequiredFields(data, required)\n\t\tif len(missing) != 1 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected nil_field to be missing, got: %v\", missing)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"empty required list\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\trequired := []string{}\n\t\tmissing := ValidateRequiredFields(data, required)\n\t\tif len(missing) != 0 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected no missing fields, got: %v\", missing)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateFieldRequirements(t *testing.T) {\n\tdata := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"name\":
